# Obsidian Tasks Parity Fixture

This deterministic vault exercises the contract surface for native Obsidian
Tasks queries. Its Tasks plugin settings mirror the Bob vault: dataview task
format, the `#task` global filter, the configured custom statuses, and the
standard query presets.

The notes cover both metadata formats, statuses, dates, priorities,
recurrence, dependencies, nesting, tags, block IDs, list markers, Query File
Defaults, underscore-prefixed folders, and tasks that intentionally omit the
global filter. Dot-directories contain sentinel tasks that must never be
indexed.
